implemented: coherent package, plugin, project, and wheel version 0.3.1
wheel RECORD hash and size verification
packaged inference and installed CLI smoke tests
sequential runtime and release launch gate
finding: The supervised runtime and distributable wheel passed a single sequential launch gate. Source-to-wheel execution is reproducible on the tested Windows environment, while unrelated ambient dependency conflicts remain explicitly excluded.
decision: Promote Tessera v0.3.1 to repository launch candidate while preserving all external launch gates.
external_launch_gates: two genuinely independent external host integrations
independent vulnerability scan and security review
independent reproduction without inherited system packages
non_claim_lock: Repository launch candidacy does not prove external production readiness, vulnerability absence, general safety, natural failure sensitivity, consciousness, or autonomous authority.
